paper.title: JobBench: Aligning Agent Work With Human Will
paper.version_status: Immutable arXiv v1 metadata fetched from the arXiv API; summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.

project_page.capture_note: Raw complete HTML captured from the official project site; the mutable page is release evidence, not manuscript-time byte identity.

official_release.timing_boundary: The pinned commit is dated 2026-07-05, after the 2026-05-25 arXiv v1 submission. Treat it as current release evidence, not the exact paper-time implementation.

dataset.local_status: Not mirrored during source acquisition. The pinned release contains setup code that downloads the dataset but does not contain the task corpus itself; the reviewer must pin/acquire the dataset revision before corpus-level claims.

acquisition_scope: Full immutable paper PDF/text, official project-page HTML, and pinned official evaluation-code archive acquired and integrity-checked. No deep review is claimed.
